model_card: NMOD NMOS LEVEL=14 VTH0=0.4 U0=0.04 TOXE=2e-9
source: ngspice 45-dev-ish built from /home/subhagato/Codes/ngspice (BSIM4.8.0 tree) patched in src/spicelib/devices/bsim4/b4temp.c to fprintf(stderr, ...) pParam->BSIM4* and here->BSIM4* after BSIM4temp returns. Patch is NOT committed anywhere. ngspice-42 (system /usr/bin/ngspice) uses the same BSIM4 4.8.0 kernel internals, so values carry over. Our C++ port is 4.7.0 but these preprocessing fields (leff/weff, vth0, u0temp, vfb, vsattemp, k1ox, cdep0, phi) have identical formulas in 4.7.0 and 4.8.0 for the parameters exercised here (default mobMod=0, default stress/NUD/NF=1).
notes: In BSIM4 4.7.0/4.8.0 the size-dependent per-instance precomputed values live on bsim4SizeDependParam (accessed via here->pParam), NOT on the instance directly. leff/weff/cdep0/k1ox/phi are pParam-only.

vth0/u0temp/vfb/vsattemp exist on BOTH pParam (base temperature-adjusted value) and the instance (stress-effect delta applied). With no LOD/stress inputs (default), instance values equal pParam values.
Goldens were captured with patched b4temp.c. Patch text for reference:
To re-derive: build ngspice with the patch, run on tests/goldens/probe.cir, grep T12_GOLDEN.
